'''zhakogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabesque|arabesque]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabesque|arabesque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhakogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zhækegeth || zhækegej || zhækegesh || zhækege
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zhakokogoth || zhakokogoj || zhakokogosh || zhakokogo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zhakogoth || zhakogoj || zhakogosh || zhakogo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zhakofgofth || zhakofgofj || zhakofgofsh || zhakofgof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhakogotho || zhakogojo || zhakogosho || zhakogoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhakogoth || zhakogoj || zhakogosh || zhakogo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhakogothol || zhakogojol || zhakogoshol || zhakogokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhakogoothotho || zhakogoojojo || zhakogooshosho || zhakogooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhakogothon || zhakogojon || zhakogoshon || zhakogokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhakogothooro || zhakogojooro || zhakogoshooro || zhakogokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
